transcript.clean_text: the last Friday of laa traditionally you might have thought one for The High Ground well this day 177 km destination iscar was anything but Caden Groves at the Forefront of everybody's Minds surely a Sprint finish well sometimes breakaways have other ideas and of course there's the all important job of making sure that those who are gunning for positions in the overall even if that happens to be best Spaniard are in exactly the place they need to be rco aapo eyes upon him but surely no break away for him today especially with the run to garama looming large a day that would absolutely suit him SE cus looking nice and relaxed shooting the breeze with the now cohesive yumbo visma who look like champions in waiting and it looks like a lockout of that Podium as well in Madrid here was your course take your pancake iron it and you just about get what we're dealing with no categorized climbs along the way so no mountains points a very late intermediate Sprint that may well draw some response and away they set well the pace was very high I guess the fear of wind was perhaps just guarding a few and making them just think about what might or may not happen well four Riders went up the road and made a good fist of just staying up there but the Gap was never really allowed to be more than 2 minutes clemon D of group armor Paul liera of H2 a citran Lear from AR samik and Schlagel from karal and they were busy sharing duties but the holding pan was of course led by alind De kerik they wanted to make sure that Kaden Groves got himself into a very smart place at the end of the day Breakaway with courts just as the intermediate Sprint loomed large in question marks as to whether Remco evapo would get himself up to challenge Caden Groves in that greed Jersey competition proved to be unfounded the Sprint came the Sprint went K Groves came home in second place behind clemon Davy of group armor Franc isure and then Samuel batistella thought well you know what we haven't done much a ster when in this race I may go long well it was a long shot that came to not we were all gathered waiting for the big turn coming at 2.3 kilm to go a right hander that essentially would lead us to a wide open Highway and surely a Sprint finish while sometimes wide open roads offer up too many opportunities for movement within the pack and that's precisely what we got big crash towards the front collecting well too many including Kaden Groves who went for a jog unclipping just before the incident the bike was swept underneath him but he remained uninjured and went back to check on everybody else well DSM seemed to be the team that were most hobbled by it up front well there was a Sprint to be won EF education easy post were trying to tea up Marine vanger B in the pink jerseys but it was this man Philip H who went for it challenged by Ian garia and then out of absolutely nowhere missing a lead out train doing a fabulous job Dai took the day Italians one two and four and you know only win you get a hug from Roman b as well how nice was that well not nice for these guys I'm afraid and even those who were blooded but unbowed the news of victory at least for DSM came as an amazing plaster upon their wounds well it was a great Drag Race by pip Gana he thought he'd got it in fact so did many people but in the end it was about 3/4s of a bike length that Dai had it paying his team back for all their faith team of course he's leaving at the end of the season still has another chance in Madrid as well Dai ahead of Ghana venar kimai Ian Garcia CA bastad lki hosta Bello and Kos sep cus getting the coues from family and friends champ him waiting well he looks nice and relaxed he leads yona's finger go who will not be challenging him by 17 seconds pretty much Rit likewise at a minute and eight a Uso best of the Spaniards Lander and mass will possibly have something to say about that tomorrow meanwhile Kaden gross courtesy of that intermediate Sprint looks secure in the green jersey it's an enormous margin that he has over Remco iopo we'll see what iopo does in the run to to garama there is an intermediate Sprint along the way and then of course we still have Madrid so this is our day a big one 10 climbs in total built for attacking straight out the back door We Are Climbing virtually no flat land to speak of at all a real Feast of drama on stage 20 awaits
